title: Power Analysis: Tadej Pogačar Crushes the Col du Tourmalet Record
summary:
Pogačar eviscerated the mythic climb to take control of the Tour de France. Here's how much power it took to set the record by over two minutes.

Read the full article at Power Analysis: Tadej Pogačar Crushes the Col du Tourmalet Record on Velo.
